title: Simply
description: A simple modpack with everything you need.
body:
**A Modpack That's Optimized, Useful, and Convenient! 🚀**

**Tired of manually installing the same essential mods every time you start a new Minecraft world? This modpack has you covered! 
🛠️ It includes all the basics you need for a smooth, enhanced gameplay experience, carefully selected for performance and compatibility. Enjoy quality-of-life improvements, performance enhancements, and essential utilities, all in one easy-to-install package. Get ready to jump straight into the action without the hassle! ✨**

![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74aa1b1ea2235a9b9ded7395cf864fda35e267b5_0.webp)
